===================
===================
=== Manchester 2005.txt
===================
===================
===================
alt.binaries.sounds.lossless.bootlegs

Bob Dylan

Manchester 2005, CC 783-784
November 16 2005, M.E.N. Arena, Manchester, England


Original Silver Discs --> EAC (Secure) --> Waw --> Flac Level 8 & Align
EAC Log Files, md5 Files (Flac & Waw), Artwork (Front, Back & Discs 300 dpi) Included



101 - Intro
102 - Maggie's Farm
103 - She Belongs To Me
104 - Cry A While
105 - Lay, Lady, Lay
106 - Most Likely You Go Your Way (And I'll Go Mine)
107 - Million Miles
108 - Stuck Inside Of Mobile With The Memphis Blues Again
109 - I'll Be Your Baby Tonight
110 - Man In The Long Black Coat
111 - Down Along The Cove
112 - Girl Of The North Country
113 - Highway 61 Revisited

201 - A Hard Rain's A-Gonna Fall
202 - Summer Days
203 - Like A Rolling Stone
204 - All Along The Watchtower 
205 - Under The Red Sky*
206 - Blind Wille McTell*
207 - Floater (Too Much To Ask)* 
208 - Masters Of War*
209 - It Ain't Me Babe*
210 - High Water (For Sharley Patton)*
211 - Just Like A Woman*

* = Bonus Tracks

205-208 November 15 2005, Nottingham Arena, Nottingham, England
209-211 November 17 2005, SECC, Glasgow, Scotland
===================
===================
===================
